title: Import & Export Data
lede: Bring contacts, leads, and accounts into iMash in bulk — either by uploading your own spreadsheet or by pulling from the built-in People Explorer directory.

steps.title: Import your own list (CSV)
steps.content:
1. Go to the list you want to add to — CRM → Contacts, Leads, or Accounts.
  2. Click the Import button at the top of the list.
  3. Upload your CSV file and follow the prompts to map your columns (name, email, phone, etc.) to the matching iMash fields.
  4. Review the preview, then confirm to import. New records appear in the list right away.

Tip: put one contact per row, and include a header row so the column mapping is easy.

steps.title: Import from People Explorer (Marketing)
steps.content:
1. In the left navigation, open Marketing and click Import Contacts / Leads / Accounts (or go to /marketing/import-people).
  2. This tool searches a large directory of people and companies so you can build a targeted list without a spreadsheet.
  3. You'll move through three steps: Build filters, Preview & select, and Map & target.

images.caption: The Marketing import wizard: build filters, preview, then map and import
The Marketing import wizard: build filters, preview, then map and import

steps.title: Build filters and preview
steps.content:
1. On Build filters, narrow the directory by criteria such as job title, company, industry, or location.
  2. Click through to Preview & select to see matching people.
  3. Tick the individuals you want, or select all matches. Click a row to inspect the full record before importing.

images.caption: Preview matches and map fields before importing
Preview matches and map fields before importing

steps.title: Map fields and choose the target
steps.content:
1. On Map & target, pick Import as: Leads, Contacts, or Accounts (companies).
  2. Map each source field to a standard column, or store extra data in custom fields.
  3. Turn on Also create companies as Accounts & link to automatically build company accounts and connect each person to theirs.
  4. Click to run the import — duplicates are merged, and a summary shows how many records were created.

steps.title: Export your data
steps.content:
• Open any CRM list (Contacts, Leads, or Accounts) and apply the filters you want to export.
  • Use the list's export option to download the filtered records for backup or use in another tool.
  • Exported records reflect the current filters and search, so narrow the list first to export only what you need.
